title: Gauntlet Scenario
description: Schema for Gauntlet scenario YAML files that define test scenarios for AI agent evaluation.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this scenario tests.

input.description: The input presented to the agent under test.

messages.description: Ordered list of messages forming the conversation input.

role.description: The role of the message sender.

content.description: The text content of the message.

world.description: Simulated world configuration including external tools and databases.

tools.description: Map of tool name to tool world reference or inline definition.

ref.description: Reference to an external tool-world YAML file.

state.description: Which state the tool should be in (e.g. nominal, timeout).

databases.description: Map of database name to database world reference or inline definition.

ref.description: Reference to an external db-world YAML file.

seed_set.description: Which seed data set to load.

assertions.description: List of assertions to evaluate against the agent's output.

type.description: The assertion type (e.g. contains, tool_called, json_path, llm_judge).

value.description: The expected value or pattern for the assertion.

path.description: JSON path expression for json_path assertions.

negate.description: If true, the assertion passes when the condition is NOT met.

chaos.description: If true, inject random failures and latency into the simulated world.

tags.description: Tags for filtering and grouping scenarios.

beta_model.description: If true, this scenario requires a beta/preview model to run.

beta_reason.description: Explanation of why this scenario requires a beta model.
